title: Don't repeat a format back-to-back
principle: Audiences reward novelty and tire of repetition. Running the same video format consecutively depresses click-through and return rate even when each one is good.
rule: Rotate formats across the upload schedule (e.g. last-to-leave, stair-stepping escalation, chase). Track format used per video so the planner never ships the same structure twice in a row.

source.name: MrBeast — 'How to Succeed in MrBeast Production' internal memo (2024 leak)
